nasb.text: Michal took the household idol and laid it on the bed, and put a quilt of goats’ hair at its head, and covered it with clothes.

esv.text: Michal took an image and laid it on the bed and put a pillow of goats’ hair at its head and covered it with the clothes.

cnv.text: 米甲把家中的一尊神像拿來，放在床上，把頭枕在用山羊毛弄成的枕頭上，再用衣服蓋著。

ccb.text: 然后她把家中的神像放在床上，头枕在山羊毛的枕头上，盖上被子。
